claims.claim: Three paths bypass canonical packet builder
claims.evidence: prepare.py:48, orchestrator.py:142, external.py:150 all call review_mod.prepare_holistic_review() directly instead of packet/build.py:build_holistic_packet()
prepare.py:55 and orchestrator.py:149 pass max_files_per_batch=coerce_review_batch_file_limit(config), but external.py:154-160 omits it
prepare.py:70 and orchestrator.py:155 set packet['config'] = redacted_review_config(config), but external.py never does
